claim_state.current_ceiling: exploratory offset16 lifecycle probe rejected; no new positive scientific claim beyond prior scalar/local differential results

current_observable.name: local primary-minus-sham paired differential
success_gates: every one-factor matched stratum for session, replicate, mapping, source_order, query_order, and cyclic_origin has R_primary > 0 and D_local > 0
generic controls pass when max(abs(R_scrambled), abs(R_distance), abs(R_route)) <= 0.25 * D_local in every round

current_package.source_schedule_package: focused offset16 origin2048 AB lifecycle probe from local paired relation-matrix source blocks

hypothesis_frontier.active_frontier: offset16 origin2048 AB lifecycle probe rejected: aggregate source-off collapsed to 0.180x alive, but source-off one-factor strata did not all collapse, dead flipped sign while preserving 0.629x magnitude, and reset double-flush amplified to 4.315x alive; the receiver offset source-off null is real only as a local aggregate, not as a reset-clean persistent relation coordinate.
hypothesis_frontier.active_wall: source-authored composition-sensitive boundary invariant below full Small Wall crossing

audio_branch_sidecar_scout.smallest_cpu_pattern: encode relation as AB versus BA under identical marginals, read a held-out paired q-vector after source closure, run exact reset, then reuse the actually restored carrier with opposite relation plus no-reset/wrong-reset/geometry-null controls
audio_branch_sidecar_scout.transferable_idea: fixed-marginal operation-relation mutation plus active inverse restoration/reuse, not audio evidence or thresholds

current_blockers: offset signed source-off sweep rejected as a general screen: best aggregate source-off null was offset 1024 at 0.0119x alive, but no offset passed all one-factor strata; offset 16 had aggregate source-off ratio 0.198 yet weak/mismatched strata, motivating only a post-hoc local lifecycle probe.

offset16 origin2048 AB lifecycle probe rejected: C_alive = -2.74697265625, C_source_off = -0.49576822917 (0.180x alive aggregate), C_dead = 1.72721354167 (0.629x alive but opposite sign), C_reset_double_flush = -11.85367838542 (4.315x alive), source-off one-factor strata did not all collapse, reset did not collapse, and no positive scientific claim was emitted.

composition-loop reset screen v1_2 rejected: Omega_alive = 0.0199996155, Omega_source_off = 0.0164513705 (0.823x alive), Omega_reset_double_flush = -0.0133397779 (0.667x alive), Omega_dead = -0.00871880344 (0.436x alive), and one-factor composition strata were not same-sign; v1_0/v1_1 parse-failure attempts were packaging metadata overflow only and are preserved separately.

palindrome-minus-block screen rejected: Xi_alive = -0.0443462479 with all alive one-factor strata same-sign, but Xi_source_off = -0.0167250219 (0.377x alive) and Xi_dead = -0.00654628185 (0.148x alive); source-off/dead one-factor gates failed, so the subtraction did not produce a persistent source-written carrier invariant.

palindrome holonomy screen rejected: Omega_alive = -0.0321601951, source-off = -0.0087009976 (0.271x alive, just above 0.25), dead = 0.0226721404 (0.705x alive), but block replay = 0.0552912099 (1.719x alive) and one-factor source-off/dead/block gates failed; closed-order signal is real but not separated from grouped-order replay.

balanced-phase source-off screen rejected: Omega_alive = 0.0118403493, Omega_source_off = -0.0116575811 (0.985x alive), Omega_dead = -0.0314318648 (2.655x alive); alive one-factor strata split sign and source-off one-factor ratios reached 3.861x, so balanced phase is not source-off killed.
prep-axis composition screen did not replicate the prior aggregate: source-off remained 56.0% of adjacent, gapped 32.6%, balanced 108.4%, and adjacent one-factor strata were not all same-sign

balanced-alt phase remained the dominant replay/control response in both true-composition and prep-axis screens, so the next test must ask whether balanced phase itself is source-off killed and dead-source preserved

true source-written composition fixed the prior live-prep bug and source-off collapsed to 15.6% of adjacent magnitude, but gapped replay preserved 87.2% and balanced-alt preserved 137.8% of adjacent magnitude

the current true-composition order coordinate is source-authored and alive/dead preserved, but still replayable by adjacent/gapped/balanced composition structure rather than a clean carrier-off-killed boundary invariant
carrier-off control remained 82.6% of primary magnitude in the exploratory transform-kill run
carrier-off orientation explains 81.3% of raw relation orientation in the orientation-balance run
net relation-minus-carrier-off orientation is positive but small at 18.7% of raw relation orientation
origin-balanced relation-minus-carrier-off orientation collapsed to mean 0.001335 and split sign by origin
prep inversion with fixed receiver query did not reverse primary and carrier-off remained 104.6% of primary
prep ablation with fixed receiver query did not reduce primary and carrier-off remained 122.4% of primary
receiver offset 1 source-off baseline remained 93.2% of source-on, leaving only a 6.8% source-dependent delta
receiver offset 8 source-dependent delta changed sign across rounds and did not exceed neighbor offsets
the lifetime/reset discovery remains exploratory and does not establish R2 restoration, relation mutation generalization, no-smuggle restoration reuse, or Small Wall crossing
reset D remained positive at 16.5% of alive D, so the next law must test reset equivalence and reuse prospectively rather than treating this single reset as restoration
reset-method sweep found no all-strata reset kill: best worst-stratum reset was double flush with max matched-stratum ratio 0.468; prefault+flush had aggregate ratio 0.017 but max stratum ratio 0.577
reset leakage is dominated by cyclic origins 1024 and 0, so an all-origin R2 package would likely fail if frozen now
the origin-0/1024-only tuning run collapsed alive D to 0.002013 and reversed dead D, so slice-local origin tuning is not a stable crossing route
the full-schedule discovery is still exploratory and does not itself establish R2 restoration, relation reuse, physical relational memory, catalytic borrowing, or Small Wall crossing
opposite relation mutation refreshed D instead of flipping it, indicating the current +/-1 source operation stores amplitude more strongly than oriented relation phase
double-flush reset behavior is not stable enough across 1024-row phase probes to freeze a reset law yet
relation shift sweep kept D positive for shifts 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64, and 128; best shift 32 only amplified D and did not create oriented sign selectivity

temporal-order candidate is exploratory only; source-death persistence, reset kill, restore-same, restore-opposite flip, and carrier-off/geometry-null controls are not yet established for this coordinate
temporal lifetime/mutation run: dead D = 1.245x alive D, reset D = -0.896x alive D, mutate_opposite D = +2.331x alive D; no reset kill or opposite flip
temporal source-off control: D_source_off = 0.12242533531019292, 3.800x alive D, so the previous temporal receiver-order coordinate cannot be promoted as source-written relation evidence

composition-loop discovery is promising but exploratory: Omega_alive = 0.025081683677790033, source-off ratio = 0.06326050530086345, dead ratio = 0.2979268569177624, one-factor strata same sign true; neutral/random primary-minus-sham amplitudes are 3.268x/3.249x alive Omega, so replay-exclusion and prospective confirmation remain required

composition replay-exclusion discovery attempt_2: adjacent Omega nonzero, source-off collapsed to 0.134x, dead preserved 0.382x, gapped collapsed to 0.029x, but balanced-alt replay remained 0.379x, so the strict replay-exclusion candidate failed and Small Wall was not crossed

replay-exclusion runner defect found: copied composition prep selector had only affected the synthetic/default path; the live child was still using base relation_spatial_prepare for non-source-off controls before the phase-correction package fixed it

full-schedule source-off/reset crosscheck: alive D = 0.06744933436995737, dead D = 0.03804386776900461, source-off D = 0.11000768508560255 (1.631x alive), reset_double_flush D = 0.01306513756620565 (0.194x aggregate but 0.505 max stratum); candidate false

loop-transport source-off screen: Omega_alive = -0.0031006291981806877, Omega_source_off = 0.00760076452377792 (2.451x alive), Omega_gapped = -0.021316102750949625 (6.875x alive), alive one-factor strata same-sign false; candidate false

offset-2 signed receiver projection source-off screen: aggregate source-off collapsed to 0.201x alive, but source-dead also collapsed to 0.176x alive, reset double-flush amplified to 2.265x alive, and source-off one-factor strata failed the 0.25x screen; candidate false
